Awesome Egocentric Atlas

Explore a curated collection of datasets, benchmarks, models, and tools for egocentric vision, embodied AI, robotics, VLA, world models, WMA, memory, AR/VR, and hand-object interaction.

Missing a resource? Open a short issue with the source, access status, and license notes.
